inline_review_comments.body: The 500ms p99 target seems aggressive given APNs latency. Consider 2s for mobile clients.
We should use Kafka here — it aligns with the event-bus architecture in EPIC-007. Redis Streams is a dead end.
Who owns the APNs credentials rotation? This needs to be spelled out.
Can we also add Slack notifications to the scope? Our ops team uses Slack heavily.
inline_review_comments.created_at_note: This comment conflicts with §3 Non-Goals (email only), and Slack is out of scope for this SPEC.

pr_level_review_comments.body: Overall looking good. The schema needs a `channel` column to distinguish WebSocket vs mobile push destinations.

issue_comments.body: Old comment from before last revision — already handled.
